generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for horizontal movement of the crane's cart via stepper motor"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for vertical lifting/hoisting of the crane's hoist via stepper motor"
]

instance ElectromagneticPickup : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Electromagnet attached to the hoist end for container (puck) pickup and release"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder measuring the hoist's angular position for trajectory validation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer measuring wind speed that influences crane stability and trajectory planning"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalData
]

instance ArduinoSensorInterface : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Centralized Arduino unit interfacing with all sensors (encoders, anemometer) and controllers via shield"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionData
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoSensorInterface
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoSensorInterface
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance KinematicTrajectoryModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used by Trajectory Generator Service to compute optimal movement paths minimizing residual swinging motion"
]

instance CADCraneModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion 360 CAD models of the crane frame and components for spatial validation"
]

instance HistoricalTrajectoryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data comparing real-time trajectory execution vs. simulation bounds for continuous validation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulationTrajectoryData
]

instance OperationalMetricsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series database entries containing motor positions (cart/hoist), swing angle encoder readings, and wind speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionData
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalData
]

instance SimulationTrajectoryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Software-generated trajectory traces used for comparison with real-time execution in Grafana dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:fromData KinematicTrajectoryModel
]

// C11: Enablers
instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PostgreSQL-based TimescaleDB time-series database for storing all operational metrics and trajectory data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance MosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker facilitating real-time data streaming between services"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataService
]

instance GrafanaDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana visualization platform displaying real-time and historical data traces (trajectory execution vs. simulation bounds)"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance DockerComposeOrchestrator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker Compose setup managing containerized deployment and networking for TimescaleDB, Mosquitto, Grafana"
    DTDFVocab:enables DeploymentService
]

instance PythonGantryLib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source Python module (gantrylib) providing modular services for trajectory generation, validation, and control"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance Fusion360Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion 360 CAD modeling platform providing spatial validation models for crane components"
    DTDFVocab:enables CADValidationService
]

// C6: Services
instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service using kinematic models to compute optimal movement paths minimizing residual swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service validating executed trajectories against simulations by calculating distance metrics and enforcing safety thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalSafetyAction
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service logging all operational data (position, wind speed, encoder readings) to TimescaleDB for offline analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing Grafana dashboards for real-time and historical data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryComparisonVisualization
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Software model implementing crane dynamics to predict outcomes of proposed trajectories"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultsInsight
]

instance DeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing containerized deployment and networking via Docker Compose"
    DTDFVocab:provides ContainerOrchestrationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight generated from trajectory optimization that reduces residual swinging motion, improving operational efficiency"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight derived from historical data analysis informing model refinements (e.g., kinematic parameters) for future iterations"
]

instance TrajectoryComparisonVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation in Grafana dashboard comparing real-time trajectory execution vs. simulation bounds"
]

instance SimulationResultsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights from software model simulations of proposed crane trajectories"
]

instance OperationalSafetyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic enforcement of safety thresholds (e.g., swing angle errors) via continuous validation service"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Time-series classification identifying anomalies (e.g., motor faults) via deviation from expected operational patterns"
]

instance KinematicParameterRefinementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Parameter updates based on historical data analysis for future model iterations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C17: Environment
instance PhysicalCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CartMotorController
    base:contains HoistMotorController
    base:contains ElectromagneticPickup
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder
    base:contains Anemometer
    base:contains ArduinoSensorInterface
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains TimescaleDBEnabler
    base:contains MosquittoMQTTBroker
    base:contains GrafanaDashboardEnabler
    base:contains DockerComposeOrchestrator
    base:contains PythonGantryLib
    base:contains Fusion360Enabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital twin interacts with the physical system through:
  - **Trajectory generation**: The Trajectory Generator Service uses a kinematic model to compute optimal movement paths (e.g., zero-swing residual trajectories) and sends commands via the Control Application (Python) to the Physical Crane Interface.
  - **Continuous validation**: The Continuous Validation Service compares real-time measurements with simulated trajectories (via Simulation Service) and triggers alerts if deviations exceed thresholds, which are relayed to the operator via the Human Machine Interface (HMI) dashboard."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates on a **real-time and continuous** time scale:
  - Data logging and sensor measurements occur at **sub-second intervals** (continuous).
  - Trajectory generation and validation processes run in real-time, with minimal latency (confirmed by continuous validation and dashboard visualization).
  - The system is designed for **low-latency synchronization** between physical and virtual components, ensuring timely feedback for operational adjustments."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation is structured as:
  - **Physical Twin (PT)**: The lab-scale gantry crane with its hardware (motors, controllers, Arduino, sensors).
  - **Digital Twin (DT) Core**: Six interconnected containers (Database, MQTT Broker, Dashboard, Trajectory Generator, Simulation Service, Continuous Validation Service) deployed via Docker.
  - **Human Machine Interface (HMI)**: Python-based frontend for operator interaction.
  - **Orchestration**: Docker Compose manages container lifecycle and inter-service communication via MQTT."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin covers the following lifecycle stages of its physical counterpart:
  - **As Designed**: Includes CAD models (Autodesk Fusion360) and kinematic models for trajectory generation.
  - **As Manufactured**: The physical crane and its controllers (TMC4671-Eval, Arduino) are implemented and interfaced.
  - **As Operated**: Continuous validation and real-time monitoring during operation, with services like trajectory optimization and fault detection."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Model Validation**: Continuous Validation Service compares real-time data with simulation traces (e.g., trajectory error metrics) to validate kinematic models.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Wind speed (anemometer) and encoder noise are logged for offline analysis; thresholds in Continuous Validation Service mitigate deviations.
  - **Verification**: CAD models and kinematic models are cross-validated with physical measurements during operation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections between the Physical Twin and Digital Twin include:
  - **Network Protocols**:
    - **MQTT (Eclipse Mosquitto)**: Real-time signaling between services (e.g., Logging Application → Database, Trajectory Generator → Control Application).
    - **SQL/PostgreSQL**: Database queries for logging and querying time-series data (TimescaleDB).
  - **Physical Interface**: Python-based `Physical Crane Interface` connects to the crane’s controllers (TMC4671-Eval) via serial communication (implied by 'connecting to the controllers')."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin is hosted/deployed on:
  - **Single-PC Deployment**: All containers (Database, MQTT Broker, Dashboard) run on a personal computer via Docker Compose.
  - **First-Time Setup**: Automated initialization of TimescaleDB and Grafana during Docker Compose startup.
  - **Scalability**: Services can be extended via the gantrylib Python module (e.g., additional sensors, controllers)."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration involves:
  - **External Systems**: The exemplar was extended for teaching purposes (e.g., harbor system integration, container identification) but is not currently linked to other digital twins or enterprise systems.
  - **Research Use**: Used in publications for continuous validation ([5]), fault detection ([6]), and DarTwin evolution ([7])."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The exemplar follows partial standardization:
  - **Open-Source Tools**: Uses open-source software (Python, Docker, TimescaleDB, Eclipse Mosquitto, Grafana).
  - **Protocols**: MQTT for real-time communication, SQL for data storage.
  - **No Industry-Specific Frameworks**: Avoids commercial digital twin frameworks (e.g., Eclipse Ditto/BaSyx) in favor of ad-hoc modular services."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety mechanisms include:
  - **Continuous Validation**: Real-time comparison of sensor data with simulations to prevent operational errors (e.g., trajectory deviations).
  - **Operator Intervention**: Alerts trigger manual actions if validation thresholds are exceeded.
  - **No Explicit Security**: No mention of encryption, authentication, or access controls for the Digital Twin services. Potential risks (e.g., malicious interference) are not addressed in the documentation."
]
